criteria_results.criterion: Item 7: isAutoYesExpired removed from validatePollingContext, comment added
criteria_results.evidence: validatePollingContext (auto-yes-poller.ts L223-238) checks only autoYesState?.enabled without calling isAutoYesExpired(). Comment at L230-231 explains getAutoYesState() internally handles expiry. Test at auto-yes-manager.test.ts confirms behavior.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 1: stripBoxDrawing not wrapping cleanOutput in detectAndRespondToPrompt
criteria_results.evidence: detectAndRespondToPrompt (auto-yes-poller.ts L326-400) passes cleanOutput directly to detectPrompt without calling stripBoxDrawing. stripBoxDrawing is only called in captureAndCleanOutput (L261). Test 'Item 1: stripBoxDrawing should be called only once per poll cycle' verifies stripBoxDrawingSpy is called exactly once.
tmux-capture-cache.ts L39: export const CACHE_TTL_MS = 3000. Test at auto-yes-manager.test.ts L2056-2058 confirms value is 3000.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 2: THINKING_POLLING_INTERVAL_MS = 5000, used in scheduleNextPoll call
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-config.ts L43: export const THINKING_POLLING_INTERVAL_MS = 5000. auto-yes-poller.ts L440: scheduleNextPoll(worktreeId, cliToolId, THINKING_POLLING_INTERVAL_MS). Test 'Item 2: Thinking detection should trigger 5s polling interval' confirms.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 3: REDUCED_CAPTURE_LINES = 300, FULL_CAPTURE_LINES = 5000, conditional logic in captureAndCleanOutput
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-config.ts L46: REDUCED_CAPTURE_LINES = 300, L49: FULL_CAPTURE_LINES = 5000. pollAutoYes (L426-430) selects captureLines based on autoYesState?.stopPattern. Tests verify captureSessionOutput is called with 300 or 5000 accordingly.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 4: precomputedLines in DetectPromptOptions, used in detectPrompt
criteria_results.evidence: prompt-detector.ts L51-61: precomputedLines field in DetectPromptOptions. L203: const lines = options?.precomputedLines ?? output.split('\n'). pollAutoYes L433 splits once, L451 passes lines to detectAndRespondToPrompt. 4 tests in prompt-detector.test.ts verify behavior.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 5: AUTO_STOP_ERROR_THRESHOLD = 20, consecutive_errors in AutoYesStopReason, threshold check in incrementErrorCount
criteria_results.evidence: auto-yes-config.ts L56: AUTO_STOP_ERROR_THRESHOLD = 20. L63: AutoYesStopReason includes 'consecutive_errors'. auto-yes-poller.ts L173-178: incrementErrorCount checks >= threshold and calls disableAutoYes('consecutive_errors'). Tests confirm 20 errors triggers auto-stop.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 5 UI: pendingStopReason state, Toast level differentiation
criteria_results.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx L203: useState<AutoYesStopReason | null>(null). L786-792: stop_pattern_matched shows 'info' toast, consecutive_errors shows 'warning' toast. L393 sets pendingStopReason from API response.

criteria_results.criterion: Item 5 i18n: consecutiveErrorsStopped keys in both locales
criteria_results.evidence: locales/ja/autoYes.json L26: consecutiveErrorsStopped key present. locales/en/autoYes.json L26: consecutiveErrorsStopped key present.
WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx L786-787: stop_pattern_matched triggers showToast with 'info' level, unchanged from prior behavior.

criteria_results.criterion: validatePollingContext from isAutoYesExpired redundant call removed
criteria_results.evidence: validatePollingContext (L223-238) no longer calls isAutoYesExpired directly. Only checks autoYesState?.enabled. Comment at L230-231 documents why this is sufficient.
251 test files passed, 5012 tests passed, 7 skipped. No failures.
TypeScript compilation completed with no errors (empty output).

test_cases.scenario: Item 1: stripBoxDrawing called only once in captureAndCleanOutput, not in detectAndRespondToPrompt

test_cases.evidence: THINKING_POLLING_INTERVAL_MS === 5000 confirmed; scheduleNextPoll called with this value

test_cases.scenario: Item 3: stopPattern unset uses 300 lines, set uses 5000 lines
test_cases.evidence: captureSessionOutput called with REDUCED_CAPTURE_LINES (300) or FULL_CAPTURE_LINES (5000) based on stopPattern

test_cases.scenario: Item 4: precomputedLines reuses pre-split lines in detectPrompt
test_cases.evidence: 4 tests in prompt-detector.test.ts verify precomputedLines behavior including identical results and fallback

test_cases.scenario: Item 5: consecutiveErrors >= 20 triggers disableAutoYes('consecutive_errors') and stops poller
test_cases.evidence: Test confirms state.stopReason === 'consecutive_errors' and getActivePollerCount() === 0 after 20 errors

test_cases.scenario: Item 5 UI: consecutive_errors shows warning Toast, stop_pattern_matched shows info Toast
test_cases.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx L786-791 differentiates toast levels by stopReason
CACHE_TTL_MS = 3000 in tmux-capture-cache.ts, verified by test

test_cases.scenario: Item 7: validatePollingContext does not call isAutoYesExpired
test_cases.evidence: Code review confirms no isAutoYesExpired call; only autoYesState?.enabled check with explanatory comment

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Thinking extended interval (5s) verified by test
Consecutive error threshold (20) auto-stop verified by test

message: All acceptance criteria verified. All 7 performance improvement items are correctly implemented with corresponding tests, i18n support, and UI integration. Quality checks (tsc, lint, unit tests) all pass.
